name: Whisper The Wolf - Sonic IDW
description:
Whisper is an anthropomorphic wolf and the last surviving member of the Diamond Cutters, a rapid-response Restoration team. She is aided by her own personal team of Wisps. Whisper joined the Diamond Cutters prior to the Eggman war, during that time they took down old Eggman bases and his forces, though sometime later were betrayed by Mimic. He took out her fellow members in the process causing her to never trust anyone and do things alone. However, after meeting Sonic, Silver and Tangle she has learned to move forward from her past and has trusted her new friends since. She even reformed the Diamond Cutters in honor of her old friends.

Whisper is also a rather mysterious individual with a quiet and withdrawn personality. Very soft-spoken, she speaks only when the situation calls for it and, true to her name, in a very low volume, rarely uttering more than a few words at a time. She also values her personal space and limited her interactions with others, fearing that if she made new friends, she could not handle losing them too. When in social situations, Whisper usually exhibits a rather bashful side of herself.

While Whisper is cautious and mistrustful of other people, she exhibits a strong bond with her Wisps that is based on trust and friendship, as illustrated by their reception of Sonic persuading her to trust him, and the Wisps' willingness to stand up to Badniks in order to defend her.

Whisper is very much a lone wolf, so to speak. Keeping to herself, she prefers to do her own thing and work on her own rather than cooperating directly with others. This is illustrated by the fact that while she assisted the Resistance during the war, she never actually joined or even revealed herself to them. Despite this, people like Sonic are able to convince her to come out of her shell and collaborate with others, like when she joined the Resistance on a mission to liberate Angel Island, during which she showed high coordination with her teammates and proved quite helpful to them. Over time, Whisper has grown more confident with her new friendships, which has caused her to reveal her most emotional side in the worst of situations. Still, she tried to act alone, fearing for the fate of her friends should they get entangled in her affairs. Once she realized people were trying to help her and she was pushing them away, she promised to work on moving on from her past and to become a better friend and teammate.
creator: _______CleaningHalls
